name: I'm on top of the ride
description: I'm on top of the ride
hints: You're on top of the merry-go-round ride. There may be a rope above if conditions are right.
If there's a rope hanging from the ceiling, JUMP to grab it and reach the catwalk.
Without the rope, jumping while the ride is moving throws you off balance - dangerous!
Drop the trampoline here first (DROP TRAM), then JUMP to reach the rope and swing to the catwalk (room 33). D=back to horse (room 7).

needs: Rope hanging from ceiling (must be in room)
effects: Message: Good thing this ropes not too long

needs: Rope hanging from ceiling (must be in room)

effects: Message: Moving ride throws me off balance

notes: Top of the merry-go-round. Need the trampoline and rope to safely JUMP to the catwalk (room 33). Without the rope, jumping is fatal. D=horse (room 7).
